name: Auto-suggest fixes — section renders and handles both states correctly
description: After a PR review, the Auto-suggested Fixes section always appears below review cards. It shows either suggestion cards (with Copy Fix buttons) or a clean-code message. Both outcomes are valid PASS states.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input and click 'Analyze PR'
Wait for the review report to fully load — the spinner disappears and review category cards are visible
A quality score bar and verdict badge are visible in the review report header
A section titled '🔧 Auto-suggested Fixes' is visible on the page
Inside the Auto-suggested Fixes section, either the text '✅ No fixes needed — code looks clean!' is displayed, or one or more fix cards are shown with issue titles
